top3.sql:
WITH czk_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
gas_consumption_2011 AS (
    SELECT ym.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN czk_customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2011'
    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID
)
SELECT CustomerID
FROM gas_consumption_2011
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC;

SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '2011-01-01' AND '2011-12-31'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

),
gas_consumption_2011 AS (

    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID
)

LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
WITH czk_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
gas_consumption_2011 AS (
    SELECT ym.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN czk_customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2011'
    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID
)
SELECT CustomerID
FROM gas_consumption_2011
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC;
